feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud: Cross Company Code Purchasing Organization for Intercompany scenarios?
entry.content:
Hi guys, 

in our scenario we have a cross-company purchasing organization and several company codes. Each company code has at least 1 plant - in some cases we have more then one plant.

We would like to use a cross company code purchasing organization for Adv. IC Stock Transfers (5HP) and Adv. Intercompany Sales (5D2). Are there any restrictions when using a cross company code purchasing organization?

I couldn't find any reference, maybe there is someone with practical experience?

Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Journal entry is not resent for verification in case rejected and resubmitted
entry.content: In Verify Journal Entries in General Ledger - For Processor (Inbox) - F2728  the entry is not resent for verification in case rejected and resubmitted.

entry.title: Net due date in down payment requests posted from SD
entry.content:
It is noticed that for down payment requests, the net due date in the posting document is always the document date. The expectation is that the net due date to be calculated based on the payment terms.

Apparently, the payment terms for the invoice or from the customer master data is also not transferred to the down payment request.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: staff scheduling on user level
entry.content: Is it possible to do personnel scheduling for individual shifts and maintain skills for individual user?

entry.title: Withholding Tax is not being calculated when posting invoices
entry.content:
During the posting of incoming invoices. When Section Code is maintained in the Basic Data tab, the system fails to calculate withholding tax. However, when the Section Code is removed, the withholding tax is calculated correctly.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to get tax to determine based off tax material classification in Settlement Management
entry.content:
From research I understand the 

Tax condition type RETX has reference condition type TTX1 and has access sequence RET1 assigned to it. In the standard content for condition type TTX1, access sequence TTX1 is assigned. The two access sequences (RET1 and TTX1) have one access in common, called Domestic taxes, which contain the following access fields:

Technical name of the conditionField description
ALANDDeparture Country/Region
TAXK1Tax Classification 1-Customer
TAXM1Tax Classification Material

 

I understand by default the tax classification material is set to 1 - How do I get the tax classification to read from the product master data in the settlement management type 0S01 - Sales Rebate ?

entry.title: G/L account for Vietnam rollout implementation
entry.content:
Hello All, 
I am configuring the Vietnam G/L accounts, and wanted to make sure that my procedure is correct. 


1. I have obtained a list of G/L accounts according to the Vietnamese Accounting Standards

2. I manually added the list into the YAVN chart of accounts. The default account codes in YAVN does not match those of the accounting standards. 

3. Map the YAVN codes to YCOA in the alternative g/l account section. Also, what should I do in the case where none of the YCOA is a good mapping target to the YAVN account?

 

Best,

entry.title: Italian special depreciation keys for ledger 2L
entry.content: For the fixed assets module, the customer uses special Italian depreciation keys for their main ledger (I03 and I38). They now need these keys to be extended to the 2L ledger (IFRS). The standard system does not allow this, as these keys are only included in Italy GAAP. Would it be possible to extend these keys to the 2L ledger?

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Communication Scenerio
entry.content:
Hi Team,

I want to know which Communication scenario code is used for the Employee master replication in the Public cloud system. The Existing Standard Integrations.

In SAP CPI, for the public cloud which standard Integrations we need to use.

Thank you

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: What Business Context – Custom Field and Logic Development in Project Budget Report at Item Level
entry.content:
We are developing a customized Project Budget Report at the item level. To proceed, we require the business context for maintaining the relevant field at the item level. Could you please provide the required details at the earliest? 

Thanks.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Missing Number Ranges in PRODUCTION SYSTEM
entry.content:
• The number range customizations for Customs Adaptation for Billing (Sub-Objects) maintained in DEV/TEST not available in PROD, even though the transport was executed successfully.
  • Manual maintenance of number ranges not possible in PROD in CBC activity 'Define Number Ranges for Billing Documents ' (missing “Add Row / Insert Line” in the SSCUI), and what is the supported way to create or correct these number ranges in the productive system.

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: FORM development in sales order to get the AVC characteristics name and Value CDS viwes.
entry.content:
Hello All,

I am working on FORM development in sales order to get the AVC characteristics name and value in the form  

but not able to find any relevant CDS view I_ConfigurationHeader and I_ConfigurationCharacteristicValue on public cloud . could you please help us on this .

Thanks

entry.title: Impact of Not Settling a Maintenance Order in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Dear experts,

I would like to ask for your guidance regarding Maintenance Orders in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud.

If costs or expenses have been posted to a Maintenance Order, but the order is not settled, what would be the impact on the system?

Specifically, if the order is processed up to Technical Completion (TECO), but Settlement and Business Completion (CLSD) are not performed, could this cause any issues or limitations?
For example:

  • Impact on Month-End or Year-End Closing

  • Open balances remaining on the Maintenance Order

  • Effects on Financial Reporting or Controlling

  • Any system checks or errors during period-end activities

I would appreciate any insights or best practices on whether settlement is mandatory before closing periods, and what potential risks may occur if settlement is not completed.

Thank you very much in advance for your support.

Best regards,
Jessada

entry.title: Unwanted message in app Review Customer Project
entry.content:
In app Review Customer Project after the following steps the system gives unwanted message "You are leaving the page. Any entries you have made in the form will be lost."

  1. Change ETC
  2. Recalculate - get message "EAC and PoC were recalculated."
  3. Set Forecast Status to Completed and Save - get message "Forecast status of project BREN28012026 updated."
  4. Click Back




------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Restriction of Billing Document Cancellation Access
entry.content:
Dear Team,

We have provided a user with access to the Manage Billing Document application. However, we do not want to allow this user to cancel billing documents.

The requirement is that the user should only be able to post billing documents, not cancel them. Currently, both posting and cancellation are handled through the same application, which makes it difficult to restrict cancellation access.

Could you please suggest how we can achieve this access control, so that the user can post billing documents without having authorization to cancel them?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Partial payment for oversea supplier invoice and record realized gain/loss on exchange rate
entry.content:
Hi,

I would like to inquire about the process for making a partial payment for an overseas supplier invoice and recording the corresponding realized exchange rate gain or loss.

I found the following information:

“The standard behavior for calculating and posting exchange differences is to do so only when the item is fully cleared.”

Could you please confirm whether there is indeed no available solution or workaround to address this scenario?

For more information, we have also considered using the residual amount function; however, this approach does not seem suitable for our customer’s business process.

entry.title: not able to create tax code
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

I am not able to create a tax code which is free number and it shows below message what is alternative we use public cloud .

entry.title: Error S:FAGL_SWITCH_OP – Open Item Management Activation Blocked
entry.content:
When trying to activate Open Item Management for G/L a account the system raises errors S:FAGL_SWITCH_OP "Ledger group-specific postings exist", referring to a document.

How can the activation be completed?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Need alternative CDS view that allows us to access the history of material prices
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I need an alternative CDS view to access the history of material prices for creating a Z report on period-wise standard cost and moving average cost of a material valuation.

Could you please help to identify which CDS view can fulfill this requirement?

Thank you!

entry.title: Liquidity item incorrectly classified
entry.content:
How to rebuild the liquidity item for the accounting document.
